twitter_posts.description:
Correction: Claude Opus 4's ~3x average speedup dates to May 2025, not May 2024. 

This evaluation has only existed since September 2024, but we backtested it on earlier models: those from May 2024 showed no speedup whatsoever.
twitter_posts.author: Anthropic

twitter_posts.title: R to @AnthropicAI: AI research is a series of next-step decisions. We looked at sessions where a human researcher took a wrong turn, showed Claude the session up to that point, and asked it what to do
twitter_posts.description: AI research is a series of next-step decisions. We looked at sessions where a human researcher took a wrong turn, showed Claude the session up to that point, and asked it what to do next. Mythos Preview improved on humans 64% of the time—up from 22% in 2024.
